title: TLMO-Additions
description: An addon mod for TouhouLittleMaid: Orihime
body:
## [TLMO-Additions]TouhouLittleMaid: Orihime-Additions

This mod is an addon of [TouhouLittleMaid: Orihime](https://modrinth.com/mod/touhoulittlemaid-orihime), which brings some addons of [TouhouLittleMaid](https://modrinth.com/mod/touhou-little-maid) to Fabric port, so you can get the detail info from original project of them.

**Now including:**
- [Maid Useful Task](https://github.com/zxy19/maid_useful_task) - It adds some useful tasks to your Maid.
- [MaidUseHandCrank](https://github.com/sch246/MaidUseHandCrank) - It allows maids to use Create's hand cranks, and their working capacity increases with favorability.
- [Touhou Little Maid: Beacon](https://github.com/KomeijiMarisa/Touhou-Little-Maid--Beacon) - It adds a beacon-like aura effect to the maids in Touhou Little Maid. Now, maids can serve as mobile beacons, providing buffs to players and other entities.
- [Touhou Maid: Affection](https://github.com/yabo083/Touhou-Maid-Affection) - It add kisses to the Touhou Little Maid.

**All license files are in [licenses folder](https://github.com/Sh1roCu/TLMO-Additions/tree/1.20.1/src/main/resources/licenses):**

- [Maid Useful Task](https://github.com/zxy19/maid_useful_task): MIT
- [MaidUseHandCrank](https://github.com/sch246/MaidUseHandCrank): MIT
- [Touhou Little Maid: Beacon](https://github.com/KomeijiMarisa/Touhou-Little-Maid--Beacon): BSD-3-Clause
- [Touhou Maid: Affection](https://github.com/yabo083/Touhou-Maid-Affection): MIT
